description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden .build_base job in the build-base stage, which runs a before_script that sources .gitlab/ci/scripts/docker_build_before_script.sh and .gitlab/ci/scripts/python_image_version.sh, then exports EXTRA_ARGS="--build-arg PYTHON_VERSION=$PYTHON_VERSION" and IMAGE_TAG=$BASE_SHA-python$PYTHON_IMAGE_VERSION, and extends the .docker_build and .parallel:python_version templates with DOCKERFILE set to docker/base/Dockerfile and IMAGE_NAME to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/base. Add a meltano_base job that extends .build_base and is limited to runs only when changes occur in docker/base/Dockerfile or poetry.lock. Add a meltano_base_forks job that also extends .build_base but excludes execution on any branches or tags of the meltano/meltano project. Both jobs inherit the Docker build steps from .docker_build to build and push the image to the GitLab Container Registry using the constructed IMAGE_TAG.
